Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Mandamus Proceeding To Proper Venue (To Marin County)
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

RULING:
RESPONDENT STEVEN GOURLEY's Motion To Transfer Mandamus Proceeding To Proper Venue (To Marin County). Granted per stipulation - transferred to Marin County. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
